finding: Associated with: hemangiomas in other organs + skin in 10-15%

differentials.name: abdominal mass ← hepatomegaly; hemangiomas of skin
differentials.raw: abdominal mass ← hepatomegaly; hemangiomas of skin

differentials.name: may present with high-output CHF 2° to AV shunts within tumor
differentials.raw: may present with high-output CHF 2° to AV shunts within tumor (8 -15-25%)

differentials.name: hemolytic anemia; Kasabach-Merritt syndrome
differentials.raw: hemolytic anemia; Kasabach-Merritt syndrome

differentials.name: cardiac dysfunction + mental retardation ← severe hypothyroidism ← tumor produces high levels of type 3 iodothyronine deiodinase activity
differentials.raw: cardiac dysfunction + mental retardation ← severe hypothyroidism ← tumor produces high levels of type 3 iodothyronine deiodinase activity

differentials.name: Kasabach-Merritt sequence (hemolytic anemia, thrombocytopenia, and consumptive coagulopathy) in fetus
differentials.raw: Kasabach-Merritt sequence (hemolytic anemia, thrombocytopenia, and consumptive coagulopathy) in fetus

differentials.name: fetal hydrops → anasarca, ascites, pleural effusion, cardiomegaly
differentials.raw: fetal hydrops → anasarca, ascites, pleural effusion, cardiomegaly

differentials.name: polyhydramnios
differentials.raw: polyhydramnios

differentials.name: Congestive heart failure
differentials.raw: Congestive heart failure

differentials.name: Hemorrhagic diathesis
differentials.raw: Hemorrhagic diathesis

differentials.name: Obstructive jaundice
differentials.raw: Obstructive jaundice

differentials.name: Hemoperitoneum ← rupture of tumor
differentials.raw: Hemoperitoneum ← rupture of tumor

differentials.name: Malignant transformation into angiosarcoma
differentials.raw: Malignant transformation into angiosarcoma (rare)

differentials.name: No treatment if asymptomatic
differentials.raw: No treatment if asymptomatic

differentials.name: Reduction in size with steroids / radiotherapy / chemotherapy
differentials.raw: Reduction in size with steroids / radiotherapy / chemotherapy (interferon-α-2a, vincristine)

differentials.name: Embolization
differentials.raw: Embolization

differentials.name: Surgical resection / liver transplantation
differentials.raw: Surgical resection / liver transplantation

differentials.name: Hepatoblastoma
differentials.raw: Hepatoblastoma (> 1 year of age, markedly elevated α-fetoprotein in 90%, more heterogeneous enhancement pattern)

differentials.name: Mesenchymal hamartoma
differentials.raw: Mesenchymal hamartoma (usually multicystic multilocular mass, hypovascular mass with enhancement of septa + solid tumor portions)

differentials.name: Metastatic neuroblastoma
differentials.raw: Metastatic neuroblastoma (elevated urinary catecholamines, adrenal / retroperitoneal / posterior mediastinal masses, nonenhancing multiple liver masses)

differentials.name: Angiosarcoma
differentials.raw: Angiosarcoma (heterogeneous SI in multifocal lesions on T2WI, lack of flow voids, central / mild peripheral enhancement)

differentials.name: low platelets; hemolytic anemia
differentials.raw: low platelets; hemolytic anemia

differentials.name: hemangioma / hemangioendothelioma / angiosarcoma → platelet sequestration by tumor → thrombocytopenic purpura → increased systemic fibrinolysis
differentials.raw: hemangioma / hemangioendothelioma / angiosarcoma → platelet sequestration by tumor → thrombocytopenic purpura → increased systemic fibrinolysis

differentials.name: disseminated intravascular coagulopathy → hemorrhage, infection, multiple organ failure
differentials.raw: disseminated intravascular coagulopathy → hemorrhage, infection, multiple organ failure

context: Prevalence:   increased with hemihypertrophy + Beckwith-Wiedemann syndrome Location in other sites: skin, trachea, thorax, adrenal gland, dura mater (10-70%); especially with multifocal liver tumors → chest x-ray, brain imaging Average size:   3.0 (range, 0.5-20.0) cm; multifocal lesions around 1 cm in diameter √  diffuse involvement of entire liver → hepatomegaly √  focal single mass (50%) / multifocal masses (50%) √  enlargement of celiac + hepatic arteries + proximal aorta √  rapid decrease in aortic caliber below celiac trunk √  enlarged hepatic veins (increased venous flow) Plain film: √
